alt: Full-length blue whale body showing enormous size beside research boat
caption: Adult blue whales can reach about 80 to 100 feet long and weigh up to 200 tons.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated blue whale size image with verified species identification. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/06/Blue_Whale_001_body_bw.jpg
